title: Tonari no Yae-chan
actors: Yumeko Aizome, Ryôtarô Mizushima, Den Ôhinata
plot: Keitaro (Obinata Den) is a law student and Yaeko (Aizome Yumeko) is a high school girl. They are neighbors, and their friendship is starting to develop into something more romantic. Then, Yaeko's sister Kyouko (Okada Yoshiko) has ...
